creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)

> - portmgr@ is not the maintainer of Mk/Uses/go.mk

Wasn't me. The pr was auto-assigned to portmgr :-)

The workaround you mentioned works of course. I guess the thing boils down to the question whether we want the compiler to generate this cache in the first place.
